name: Lemon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the lemon rind to the mixture; beat well.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Stir in the lemon juice.
5. Gradually sift in the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt), mixing until just combined.
6. Pour batter into a buttered and floured 8-1/2 x 4-1/2 x 2-1/2-inch bread pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack.
9. Do not slice until the next day.
